# Automated File Management Notice

Some files in this `.github/` directory may be managed by automation from the [nsheaps/.github](https://github.com/nsheaps/.github) repository.

**These files may be overwritten without warning** when the central configuration is updated.

## What this means

- Changes made directly to managed files in this repository may be lost
- If you need to modify a managed file, consider:
  1. Opening a PR in [nsheaps/.github](https://github.com/nsheaps/.github) to update the central config
  2. Requesting the file be removed from automation for this repository

## More information

See the [file sync documentation](https://github.com/nsheaps/.github/blob/main/docs/file-sync.md) for details on how this automation works.
